hero.title: Architecture Over Apps
hero.subtitle: We don't build websites — we install Unified Commercial Engines. Choose your partnership depth to reclaim your commercial sovereignty.

tiers.name: 90-Day Partnership
tiers.subtitle: The Diagnostic EKG & Foundations
tiers.description: Establish your perimeter and kill the manual entry tax. We execute the 250+ point Revenue Journey Assessment and install your high-fidelity operational radar.

tiers.name: 6-Month Partnership
tiers.subtitle: Engine Orchestration & Velocity
tiers.description: Stop decorating and start engineering. We achieve 60% automation across your lead-to-expansion lifecycle and install the Managed Nervous System.

tiers.name: 12-Month Partnership
tiers.subtitle: The Unified Engine & Sovereignty
tiers.description: Complete Commercial Sovereignty. We migrate your entire stack to proprietary infrastructure, eliminating vendor lock-in and six-figure dependency costs.

phases.name: Phase II: Orchestration
phases.description: Installing the Managed Nervous System and IF APIs.

phases.name: Phase III: Sovereignty
phases.description: Transitioning to proprietary Sovereign Engine infrastructure.
